brand_identity.name: Vivam Software Services
brand_identity.theme_strategy: Dual Theme (Deep Navy Dark Mode / Cool Swiss Light Mode)
brand_identity.core_philosophy: Fusion of robust engineering and fluid design. Not just software, but digital acceleration.

secondary_font.name: Inter
secondary_font.usage: Body text, UI elements, Buttons, Inputs

dark_bg.description: Deep Navy/Black - Premium Dark Mode Base

light_bg.description: Cool White - Clean Light Mode Base

layout_strategies.card_style: Glassmorphism: bg-background/60 backdrop-blur-lg border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

hero.visual: Abstract 3D Network or Animated Gradient Orb

tech_stack.style: Greyscale logos that light up colored on hover

testimonials.style: Large quote marks, profile picture prominent

contact_form.style: Clean inputs with floating labels or minimal borders

assets.tech_stack_logos: Use Simple Icons CDN (e.g., https://cdn.simpleicons.org/react/3B82F6) for: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Spring Boot, Node.js, Python, FastAPI, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, AWS, Kubernetes

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install 'framer-motion' immediately. It is required for all animations.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update 'tailwind.config.js' to include the 'Outfit' font family and custom colors.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create a 'Layout' component that wraps the app with the Navbar, Footer, and Theme Provider.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the Hero section with the 'Abstract Blue Grid' image as a subtle background with a dark overlay, and use Framer Motion for text entrance.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Build the 'Services' section using a Bento Grid layout. Use glassmorphism cards.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Implement the Contact Form with fields: Name, Email, Company, Phone, Project Details, Budget. Ensure it validates using Zod.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_7: Ensure Dark/Light mode toggle works perfectly. Default to Dark Mode for the 'Premium' feel.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_8: Use the provided Unsplash URLs for the respective sections. Do not leave placeholders.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit'.
Do not use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-950 (#020617).
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (AA standard).
Add 'hover:scale-105' transitions to cards for interactivity.
Keep the design 'Airy' - use py-24 or py-32 between major sections.
